name: azAd-Boilerplate
description: A boilerplate and toolkit for custom coded HTML ads.
author: Christoph Eckert <christoph@behring5.de>

scripts.build:css: sass --no-source-map src/style.scss src/style.css && sass --no-source-map --style=compressed src/style.scss src/style.min.css && sass --no-source-map tools/preview-mode/azPreview.scss tools/preview-mode/azPreview.css && sass --no-source-map --style=compressed tools/preview-mode/azPreview.scss tools/preview-mode/azPreview.min.css
scripts.build:js: terser src/azAd.js -o src/azAd.min.js && terser tools/preview-mode/azPreview.js -o tools/preview-mode/azPreview.min.js
scripts.build:dist: cpy src/index.html src/azAd.min.js src/style.scss src/style.min.css dist --flat && cpy "src/assets/**" dist/assets --flat
scripts.build: npm run build:banner && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:banner && npm run build:dist
